ead.archdesc:

English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
New York State College of Human Ecology Centennial records
New York State College of Human Ecology
Brumberg, Joan Jacobs.
23-2-3169
1.6 cubic feet. 1.6 cubic feet.
1991-2001. Minutes of meetings, Memoranda, Brochures, Course Background Material, and Time Capsule. Records concerning the year-long College of Human Ecology Centennial Celebration (2000-01) and the related development program. Collection material in English 4069426
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Clark, Damon
Date completed:
July 9, 2002
EAD encoding:
Clark, Damon July 9, 2002
Date modified:
Marcie Farwell, October 2018
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Records concerning the year-long College of Human Ecology Centennial Celebration (2000-01) and the related development program, including minutes of meetings, memoranda, brochures, background on Joan Jacobs Brumberg's course "Archival Research: Exploring the History of Home Economics" and the subsequent exhibition "From Domesticity to Modernity: What Was Home Economics?" Includes a CD of the exhibition web site and a time capsule created by Human Ecology students, to be opened in 2025.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Calendar of Events Box 1 folder 1
Series II. Planning and Development Box 1 folders 2-16
Series III. Centennial Events Box 1 folders 17-30
Series IV. Exhibits
Series V. Centennial Exhibit: "From Domesticity to Modernity: What Was Home Economics?" Kroch Library Box 1 folders 31-49
series VI. HD 455 "Archival Research: Exploring the History of Home Economics" (Joan Jacobs Brumberg) Box 1 folders 50-55
series VII. History and Background to Centennial Events Box 1 folders 56-61
series VIII. Time Capsule Box 2
Cite As:
New York State College of Human Ecology Centennial records, #23-2-3169. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Access Restrictions:
Access to Box 2 restricted until 2025.
Time capsules. Home economics -- Study and teaching. Home economics -- Exhibitions. Human ecology -- History. Home economics -- History. Cornell University -- : Students.
